heading: Edit an Archiving Rule
body:
> **Important:** 
>
> Feature unavailable in Flex Clusters
>
> Flex clusters don't support this feature at this time. To learn more,
> see [Atlas Flex Limitations](flex-cluster-limitations).

You can modify the number of days to keep data on the Atlas
cluster (the **Age Limit**) or the custom JSON (Javascript Object Notation) query used
to select documents for archiving from the Atlas UI and API (Application Programming Interface). You
can't change the archiving criteria from **Date Match** to
**Custom Filter**, or vice versa.
